description: Magic that summons, creates, and transports - calling creatures from nothing, fabricating objects, opening portals, and traversing planes.
abilities: Blink
A gentle gust and the caster is somewhere else. No flash, no trail, just a brief absence and a quiet reappearance nearby.
Chaos Ball
A tiny bouncing ball that avoids the living and destroys everything else. Pottery, glass, furniture, dignity. Harmless to creatures. Devastating to rooms.
Conjure
An imagined object willed into existence from raw magic. A perfect visualization produces a flawless result. A muddled attempt yields something warped and strange.
Create
Raw magic shaped into a single, flawless, real object. Gems, weapons, exact replicas. Extraordinarily taxing, as though magic resents being shaped so precisely.
Dark Door
A knock on any door transforms it into a portal to a known shadow plane. If it closes behind you, find another way out.
Eternity Gate
A projection past all realities to pose a single question to eternity itself. A clean connection yields truth. A faltering one traps the mind beyond the veil.
Familiar
A tiny spectral companion with its own opinions and a loyalty that must be earned. Mistreat it, and one morning you'll wake up alone.
Force Field
A paper-thin wall of force conjured in any shape. Barrier, bridge, invisible platform. Nothing nonmagical passes through until overwhelming force shatters it.
Gate
A room claimed as your Circle, a permanent anchor. A snap of the fingers teleports all willing allies there across any distance.
Helen's Fantastic Feast
An elaborate feast conjured from nothing. Steaming platters, fine drink, furniture materializing in warm light. It restores the body and lifts the spirit equally.
Invoke
The body left behind, the spirit projected among the stars for a brief audience with a divine avatar. Earnest questions receive truthful answers.
Peerless Pilot
A conjured hot air balloon piloted by a small, talkative illusory creature. It takes instructions, remembers past journeys, and chatters cheerfully among the peaks.
Pegasus Cloak
Illusory feather cloaks shimmering with opalescent light, lifting creatures above the ground to drift like dandelion seeds. They descend gently rather than fall.
Planecraft
An entire shadow plane conjured from imagination. Forests, cities, oceans that look and feel real, but nothing created inside can leave.
Portal
A crackling portal that looks like a window to whatever lies beyond. Cast again to link them. Anyone may step through.
Rift
A magnificent gateway, stone archway or humble wooden door, that opens a brief portal to the planar nexus. It flickers and groans before collapsing.
Shadow Haven
A hand on a dwelling duplicates its interior in a hidden shadow plane. Only those the caster permits may enter this perfect illusory sanctuary.
Shield
A luminous barrier wrapping the body in light. Each blow absorbed chimes faintly until the energy is spent and the shield shatters like glass.
Telekinesis
Objects and creatures moved by willpower alone. Gently lifted and manipulated with precision, or hurled through the air with violent, bone-rattling force.
Teleport
A snap of the fingers and everyone willing arrives at a chosen destination. A flawless jump lands safely. Turbulence scatters travelers or tears the spell apart.
